description: Delivered end-to-end chip-development workflow tooling using Java, Vue.js, and SQL across teams. Built backend APIs and microservices with Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB. Developed responsive workflow UI with Vue.js and JavaScript, with performance profiling and UX iteration. Deployed containerized services using Docker, Kubernetes, and ELK for scalable operations and observability.

company: Northeastern University Computer Architecture Research Lab
description: Simulated cache with 98% hits using NVBit and CUDA, diagnosing bottlenecks in Nsight Systems. Architected Luthier tools for AMD DBI for cross-vendor profiling and kernel-level instrumentation. Analyzed batch sizes across LLaMA, RNN, Transformer, and MLP models with NumPy, PyTorch, and TorchMetrics. Standardized CNN training on CIFAR-10 and Fashion-MNIST with CUDA, delivering 40% faster epochs. Automated ML HPC runs on Linux with Slurm sbatch Bash scripts for reproducibility.

Shipped features and bug fixes across 15+ projects in Agile sprints, accelerating production release cycles. Migrated legacy applications from C#/.NET to Django and Vue.js. Architected resilient backend APIs and data models using Django MTV and PostgreSQL, impacting 500+ users. Debugged GCP production incidents, reducing deployment failures by 40% with Kubernetes and Terraform. Enhanced code quality by reviewing 50+ pull requests across backend and frontend.
